title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
